description: List of alphanumerical quantities, the heading opens with "מביעה" (sold). Some of the entries may include the unit qirat, but the word קירט in question does not adhere to the normal spelling קיראט/قيراط. The text to the right of this list may be a formulary given that it includes the word פלוני (l. 25) but its exact purpose is unclear. The scribal hand is difficult to place chronologically, perhaps 14th-16th-century(?). Further examination required.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
